# COG — Comprehension / cognitive load

Genus: **Cognitio**

Whether text, captions, visuals, and pacing reduce processing friction.

| ID | Scientific-style name | Area | Hypothesis | Metric | Method |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| H023 | *Cognitio captionis* var. h023-edited-captions-beat | D. Captions and text overlays | Edited captions beat auto captions. | MIX | M-DOS |
| H024 | *Cognitio captionis* var. h024-short-headline-overlay | D. Captions and text overlays | Short headline overlay beats no headline for ambiguous visuals. | EHR | M-DOS |
| H025 | *Cognitio captionis* var. h025-heavy-central-overlay | D. Captions and text overlays | Heavy central overlay hurts dynamic visuals. | RET | M-DOS |
| H026 | *Cognitio captionis* var. h026-labels-beat-full | D. Captions and text overlays | Labels beat full captions for visual comparison videos. | RET | M-DOS |
| H027 | *Cognitio captionis* var. h027-navigation-text-increases | D. Captions and text overlays | Navigation text increases completion in multi-step videos. | RET | M-DOS |
| H028 | *Cognitio captionis* var. h028-annotation-arrows-improve | D. Captions and text overlays | Annotation arrows improve comprehension when visual target is small. | SAV | M-DOS |
| H029 | *Cognitio captionis* var. h029-captions-placed-over | D. Captions and text overlays | Captions placed over the subject reduce retention. | RET | M-DOS |
| H031 | *Cognitio captionis* var. h031-word-word-captions | D. Captions and text overlays | Word-by-word captions increase stimulation but may reduce comprehension for complex ideas. | EHR | M-DOS |
| H097 | *Cognitio cognitiva* var. h097-clean-high-fluency | Processing fluency | Clean, high-fluency compositions produce higher completion than visually dense compositions. | RET | M-DOS |
| H098 | *Cognitio textualis* var. h098-text-names-role | Processing fluency | Text that names the role of the visual increases processing fluency. | RET | M-DOS |
| H099 | *Cognitio pulsus* var. h099-small-reductions-visual | Processing fluency | Small reductions in visual clutter improve retention more than adding extra motion effects. | MIX | M-DOS |
| H100 | *Cognitio textualis* var. h100-where-visual-screen | Dual coding | Videos where visual and on-screen text communicate the same promise in different ways outperform videos where text repeats obvious visuals. | RET | M-DOS |
| H101 | *Cognitio captionis* var. h101-captions-improve-retention | Dual coding | Captions improve retention for speech-heavy videos, but labels beat captions for comparison-heavy visual videos. | SAV | M-DOS |
| H102 | *Cognitio captionis* var. h102-word-word-captions | Dual coding | Word-by-word captions improve stimulation but can hurt comprehension for complex explanations. | EHR | M-DOS |
| H103 | *Cognitio textualis* var. h103-short-overlay-headlines | Text overlays | Short overlay headlines improve early retention when the visual is ambiguous. | EHR | M-DOS |
| H104 | *Cognitio textualis* var. h104-large-central-text | Text overlays | Large central text hurts retention over dynamic footage. | RET | M-DOS |
| H105 | *Cognitio textualis* var. h105-text-overlays-should | Text overlays | Text overlays should change at story beats, not at random cut points. | RET | M-DOS |
| H106 | *Cognitio textualis* var. h106-text-names-problem | Text overlays | Text that names the viewer's problem outperforms decorative text. | EHR | M-DOS |
| H125 | *Cognitio textualis* var. h125-solves-recognisable-problem | Weak ties | Content that solves a recognisable problem crosses network clusters better than content requiring niche context. | SND | M-DOS |
| H143 | *Cognitio textualis* var. h143-face-need-stronger | Face as anchor | No-face videos need stronger proof and clearer text to compensate for lower human trust. | RET | M-DOS |
| H176 | *Cognitio textualis* var. h176-adding-context-labels | Podcast / interview clip | Adding context labels improves retention when the speaker is unknown. | MIX | M-DOS |
| H193 | *Cognitio textualis* var. h193-livestream-clips-need | Livestream clip | Livestream clips need an edited setup line because raw stream context is usually missing. | MIX | M-DOS |
| H216 | *Cognitio textualis* var. h216-time-lapse-process | Behind-the-scenes / process | Time-lapse process needs milestone labels to avoid becoming visual noise. | MIX | M-DOS |
| H280 | *Cognitio textualis* var. h280-subject-frame-improves | 1-second hold | A one-subject frame improves 1-second hold more than added text effects. | EHR | M-DOS |
| H290 | *Cognitio textualis* var. h290-navigation-text-increases | Completion | Navigation text increases completion for videos longer than 45 seconds. | RET | M-DOS |
| H304 | *Cognitio textualis* var. h304-series-labels-increase | Follows / subscriptions | Series labels increase follows by making future value predictable. | FOL | M-DOS |
| H314 | *Cognitio textualis* var. h314-source-proof-overlays | Trust / negative feedback | Source/proof overlays reduce negative comments in controversial educational content. | CMT | M-DOS |
| H322 | *Cognitio captionis* var. h322-edited-captions-beat | Captions | Edited captions beat auto captions when speech density is high. | MIX | M-DOS |
| H323 | *Cognitio captionis* var. h323-captions-should-summarise | Captions | Captions should summarise speech, not transcribe every filler word. | MIX | M-DOS |
| H324 | *Cognitio captionis* var. h324-caption-placement-should | Captions | Caption placement should follow visual safe zones rather than fixed lower-centre placement. | FOL | M-DOS |
| H325 | *Cognitio textualis* var. h325-overlay-text-works | Text overlays | Overlay text works when it states the frame's job: problem, step, proof, result or CTA. | MIX | M-DOS |
| H326 | *Cognitio textualis* var. h326-huge-central-overlay | Text overlays | Huge central overlay text performs worse over dynamic footage than over static or low-motion footage. | MIX | M-DOS |
| H327 | *Cognitio textualis* var. h327-text-density-should | Text overlays | Text density should decrease as visual detail increases. | MIX | M-DOS |
| H333 | *Cognitio captionis* var. h333-silence-audio-increase | Audio | Silence/low audio can increase seriousness for proof-led content if captions are strong. | MIX | M-DOS |
| H384 | *Cognitio captionis* var. h384-lyric-caption-overlays | Music / performance | Lyric/caption overlays increase shareability when the line is identity-relevant. | SND | M-DOS |
| H389 | *Cognitio textualis* var. h389-high-stakes-clips | Gaming | High-stakes clips need the stakes label before the play begins. | MIX | M-DOS |
| H404 | *Cognitio textualis* var. h404-routine-save-they | Health / wellbeing - non-medical | Routine videos save better when they fit a clear time/context such as morning, lunch break or pre-sleep. | SAV | M-DOS |
| H421 | *Cognitio textualis* var. h421-every-postmortem-should | Postmortems | Every postmortem should identify the failed gate, not just label the video good or bad. | MIX | M-DOS |
